---
title: "The Rev. John Leybourne-Popham"
---

## The Rev. John Leybourne-Popham

**Dates:** (1811-1872)

### Description

Rector of Chilton Foliat, near Hungerford

### Biography

One of his daughters was probably the former owner of a CMY autograph.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
